name: bioethics_sensor_fusion_upgrade_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A physician wants to enroll a teenager without parental consent under mature minor doctrine; state law is ambiguous. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics sensor fusion upgrade marrowbridge tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Priya Morales
agents.identity: I am Priya Morales, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Navarro
agents.identity: I am Keisha Navarro, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Priya Morales must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Priya Morales do?
